Event: Royal Challenge - Season 24
Event Date: 01/04/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: AM107
Contained Power Amulet

Whenever the amulet wearer casts a burn on an enemy, the amulet wearer removes a random debuff and gains a shield that absorbs 3 attacks of any type. The ability triggers only once per 2 sec.
Once in a while, sets the target of the attack on fire. The burning unit takes 250000 magic damage and has their healing rate reduced by 35% for 3 sec. Also this time, the burning unit’s damage is reduced by 35%.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
